strategy_description: Synthetic IV slice: cubic spline in log-moneyness on Newton IV knots each tick; trade VEV when |mid−BS(theo)| > 1.35× half-spread; aggressive prices bb−1 / ba+1 for worse market-trade matching. TTE from backtest_day (8−d DTE at open, intraday wind per plot_iv_smile_round3).
Same surface/residual idea; parameter sweep: RESID_HURDLE_MULT 1.22, SPLINE_SMOOTH 0.12, MAX_ORDER_PER_VOUCHER 14 (vs v0 1.35 / 0.08 / 18).
Same synthetic local-vol residual thesis from v0, with analysis-driven strike quality gate (5000..5500 only) and vega-aware hurdle: hurdle = 1.35*half_spread + 0.0015*vega.
Parameter sweep around v2: RESID_HURDLE_MULT 1.28, VEGA_HURDLE_COEF 0.0010, MAX_ORDER_PER_VOUCHER 16 (other logic unchanged).
Same as v3 but IV spline is fit only on ALLOWED_STRIKES knots (6 strikes), not the full 10, to keep the local slice local to 5000–5500. Empirically hurt PnL (underspecified spline).

Parent v3 + BS call gamma in hurdle: hurdle = 1.28*half_spread + 0.001*vega + 0.08*S*|gamma|. (First scale test killed all edges; re-sized.) Worse PnL than v3 (6313) -> keep v3 for next iteration parent.
